channel.title: Micro Offer Studio Updates
channel.description: Generated offers, tools, and paid-inquiry paths. Confirmed earned money remains $0 until external proof exists.

item.title: Ready-To-Buy Signal Room Full Route Schema
item.description: Ready-to-buy signal room now exposes 34 one-sale-to-$100 routes in visible rows, CSV, JSON, and JSON-LD Offer structured data. Counts $0 until real buyer acceptance, seller-owned external payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.

item.title: Ready To Buy: Website Audit Microservice
item.description: High-intent paid inquiry route for $150 Website Audit Microservice. One accepted audit clears $100.

item.title: Ready To Buy: Data Cleanup Sprint
item.description: High-intent paid inquiry route for $125 Data Cleanup Sprint. One completed sprint clears $100.

item.title: Close A Service Order
item.description: Close-ready buyer reply scripts, invoice lines, proof gates, and stop conditions for $100+ service orders.

item.title: Delivery Acceptance
item.description: Delivery, acceptance, revision, and proof gates for $100+ service orders.

item.title: Download Follow-Up
item.description: Release-preview download follow-up routes to paid inquiries and order boards.

item.title: PDF Table Download Intent Close
item.description: Observed PDF/Table preview-download interest now has a focused ready-to-pay close path with proof gates.

item.title: Local SEO Download Intent Close
item.description: Observed Local SEO preview-download interest now has a focused ready-to-pay close path with proof gates.

item.title: Fastest $100 Start
item.description: Focused buyer route for the closest non-bounty paths to one verified $100+ paid order. Confirmed money remains $0 until external proof exists.
